SHORT NAME: IP_MH_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: IP_MH_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
VALUES: 
0: Neither billing provider nor servicing provider(s) on claim are Mental health (MH) providers 
1: Both MH billing provider and servicing provider(s) on claim 
2: Only MH billing provider on claim 
3: Only MH servicing provider(s) on claim 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown
